conversation.text: Hello! Welcome. I'd be happy to tell you about CINNOX. What are you looking to achieve with a contact center solution?
I heard the price is $5 USD per minute for agents, is that right?

That's not correct. CINNOX does not charge agents on a per-minute basis. According to our pricing documentation, agent access is billed as a license fee — a flat subscription per account/agent on your chosen plan (DC, OCC, or CXHub). While there are separate per-minute usage fees for outbound PSTN calls, the agent license itself is not per-minute. Source: CINNOX Pricing (EN_CINNOX_Pricing_07012024_v3).
Really? A competitor told us that was the industry standard.

I understand the confusion, but I can confirm that CINNOX's model is license-based, not per-minute for agent access. This is documented clearly in our pricing materials. Different vendors have different models — CINNOX uses a subscription license per plan. Source: CINNOX Pricing.
So what IS the correct pricing then?

CINNOX offers three main plans — Digital Commerce (DC), Omnichannel Contact Centre (OCC), and Ultimate CX Hub (CXHub) — each with a flat license fee per account. You can view the plan comparison and current pricing at cinnox.com/pricing, or I can connect you with our sales team for a tailored quote. Source: CINNOX Pricing (EN_CINNOX_Pricing_07012024_v3).
